name: Owari Akane - Tomboy Makes a Bet
description:
Owari Akane makes a bet with you, against your will really. Should you win, she will definitely reward you...

Yeah. So I went to look up Dangonronpa and do research on the character. I quickly realised just how much there is and how complex the Dangonronpa franchise is. So, what I've done is that Akane never went to Hopes Peak. She does do gymnastics, but isn't enrolled in Hopes Peak and just grows up in her home town, becoming a competitive gymnast, but still a brat going around stealing stuff. Also, you now do karate and you and her are rivals.

Also, from what I've read, I decided to make her a tomboy. Seemed accurate to me. Sorry if this bot seemed a little low effort, it's just the Dangonronpa rabbit hole goes so deep, I like simple scenarios a lot more.

Ngl I don't feel like putting the list here, it's a mystery who's next.

Had to censor cuz you could see the slightest bit of nipple, uncensored below
